name: deeppapernote
description: Academic paper reading and Obsidian note generation skills for building a research WIKI.

interface.shortDescription: Generate deep-reading notes for research papers.
interface.longDescription: Turn one paper at a time into an evidence-first, Obsidian-oriented deep-reading note with metadata, figures, tables, formulas, limitations, and final quality checks.
defaultPrompt: Generate a deep-reading note for this paper.
Turn this DOI or arXiv paper into an Obsidian note.
Read this local PDF and write a research note.
